title: 日本ダービーの後に・覇王の凱旋

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First place goes to T.M. Opera O! She's earned
the honor of becoming a Derby champion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! Spandendo! More, more!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes, it is I who shall perform the victor's aria!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But, yes... I know. The rest of our cast will not be
leaving the stage anytime soon.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, my history-making comrades?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Oh! Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ah... It's nothing! Hahaha...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I think that was a first?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
You were staring right at her, and you looked...
frustrated.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ahh... Really, though, I'm disappointed too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping I'd be the one to make you look like
that.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Top Road...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I'm sure of it now. You'll be even stronger
at the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I won't be slacking off though! I'll keep training
during summer camp. I'll focus on stamina as much
as I can!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Then we'll compete again, Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: This time, at the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: We'll do this all again...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (My legs are shaky... I'm tired.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(But my body feels oddly light, like a balloon
drifting away after the string was cut...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Almost like... I could start running again, at this
very moment.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The final race of the Classic Triple Crown is next...
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it'll be like today.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.
